title: SMTP Relay Behavior Requires Immediate Review
description: The mail service accepted relay-style SMTP commands without authentication during a bounded validation check.
impact: Unauthenticated relay behavior can enable abuse, spam delivery, reputation damage, and downstream blacklisting.
likelihood: High if the behavior is reproducible from external networks.
recommendations: Disable unauthenticated relay behavior and review SMTP relay policy immediately.
Restrict relay permissions to trusted hosts, authenticated users, or explicit connectors only.
Review mail logs for evidence of abuse or misrouted relay traffic.
